$comment: Single source of truth for CocoIndex design tokens. Edit here; tokens.css is generated (npm run build:tokens). Leaf keys are the exact CSS custom-property names, minus the leading '--'. JS reads via code-theme.mjs; Python diagram/cover generators read color values directly.

color.$comment-ink-states: Semantic state inks — one decision, every component. ink-active = selected/current text on coral tints; ink-success = success text on light surfaces (raw palm-ink is 3:1, this clears 4.5).
color.$comment-cream-bright: Text tint for coral fills — cream on coral is 4.37:1 (fails AA 4.5); this clears it. Labels/small text on --coral only.
color.$comment-cream-dark-surface: Opaque text tints for dark maroon surfaces — cream blended over --maroon at 85/70/65%. Use instead of alpha/color-mix text colors (they double-dim when nested).
color.$comment-paper-hex: Plain-hex twin of paper (#FBF6E8) for <meta name="theme-color"> and other non-CSS consumers that read tokens.json directly. Keep equal to paper.
color.$comment-oat: DEPRECATED — collapsed into paper-2 (equal value); kept for tokens.json consumers. Use --paper-2.
color.$comment-paper-2: Deeper cream band one step below --paper, hue-aligned to paper (h 90.5 ≈ #EFEBDF). Fill for tag/chip surfaces and the footer band.
color.$comment-hn-orange: Hacker News brand orange — external, for HN icon chips only. Not part of the CocoIndex palette; do not reuse.

$comment-code: Syntax-highlighting palette — the single shared theme for fenced code on home, blog, and docs (GUIDELINE §5.5). Saturated brand accents are softened for readability in ten-line snippets: functions salmon (not pink), numbers muted-amber (not gold), strings soft-green (not raw palm). code-theme.mjs reads these; the blog/docs Shiki configs both consume that one object so highlighting can't drift.
$comment-font: Hum-theme typography: Plus Jakarta Sans everywhere (no serif). Display role = weight 600 + tight tracking (700 only for the logo wordmark + footer statement), body role = weight 400. Mono ships 400/500 only. Emphasis is coral + weight 600, never italic.

font.sans: "Plus Jakarta Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

$comment-text: Hum modular type scale (major third, x1.25). Every font-size snaps to a step; heroes use --text-display. xs 10.24 / sm 12.8 / base 16 / md 20 / lg 25 / xl 31.25 / 2xl 39 / 4xl 61. text-3xl and text-display are the Hum-07 fluid clamps (ceilings 48 / 78.4). text-code (14) sits off-scale for fenced + inline code readability.
$comment-tracking: Letter-spacing roles — one value per role, not per file. track-label = the uppercase mono label register; track-code = code chrome (filenames, lang tags, kbd).
$comment-effect: The "indexing dots" texture — one canonical radial-dot gradient for every dotted ground and hover reveal, tuned per use via custom props: --dot-color (coral) / --dot-alpha (45%) / --dot-r1 + --dot-r2 (dot radius / fade edge). Grid pitch via background-size (--dot-reveal-size). Defaults = the classic coral hover reveal.

effect.dot-reveal: radial-gradient(circle, color-mix(in oklab, var(--dot-color, var(--coral)) var(--dot-alpha, 45%), transparent) var(--dot-r1, 1.3px), transparent var(--dot-r2, 1.7px))

$comment-motion: Micro-interaction layer runs on three durations + --ease (see motion.css). Two named exceptions above that scale: --dur-lift + --ease-spring = the Hum-07 color-shift card/icon overshoot lift (DocCard); --dur-morph = the Nav scroll-to-pill morph. Reach for tokens, never hand-roll a duration or bezier.

motion.$comment-dur-pulse: Breathing pulses (live dots, the footer heart) — always with ease-in-out, the one non---ease easing (decel easing reads wrong on a loop).
motion.$comment-ease-snap-push: hum-07 vocabulary: snap = easeOutExpo for tick-ups/reveals; push = the button-press easing.

z.$comment-z-pop: In-content popovers/dropdowns — above sticky rails, below the nav bar.
